loading.connectionFailed: Connection failed! Please verify if the Backend server is running.

settings.title: Application Settings
settings.subtitle: Configure server directories, client files, encoding, and client GRFs.
settings.reload_cache_subtitle: Force backend to reload all YAML and LUA files from directories.

database.title: Server Database
database.label: RATHENA DB FOLDER (REQUIRED)
database.sublabel: Full path to your rAthena db/ folder (e.g., C:/rAthena/db)

client.title: Client Files
client.iteminfo_sublabel: Path to System/iteminfo.lua or iteminfo.lub of your client.
client.grf_override_sublabel: Folder to save custom client files (e.g., kRO/data/). Must be a folder.
client.achievements_lua_sublabel: System/achievements.lub or achievement_list.lub path of your client.
client.achievements_lua_placeholder: Leave blank to auto-detect relative to ItemInfo
client.quests_lua_sublabel: Path to OngoingQuests.lub or OngoingQuestInfoList.lub in your client.
client.quests_lua_placeholder: Leave blank to auto-detect relative to ItemInfo

grf.title: GRF Files
grf.subtitle: Configure up to 10 GRF files (DATA.INI order). GRF 0 has MAXIMUM priority.
grf.placeholder: GRF {priority}: path to .grf file or folder...
grf.empty: No GRFs configured. Click "Add GRF" to start.
grf.limit_reached: Maximum limit of {max} GRFs reached (matches the official RO client DATA.INI limit)
grf.override_sublabel: Folder where the editor saves custom sprites and icons. Required when using binary .grf files.

advanced.title: Advanced Settings
advanced.server_encoding_sublabel: Encoding used to read/write server database files (default: UTF-8).
advanced.client_encoding_sublabel: Encoding used to read client LUB files (kRO CP949 or CP1252).
advanced.cors_sublabel: Allowed CORS origins for the API server (comma-separated).
advanced.encoding_subtitle: Define text encoding for reading server and client files.
advanced.server_encoding_desc: Used to read mob_skill_db.txt and other text database files.
advanced.client_encoding_desc: Used to read itemInfo.lua and file names inside GRFs.

divinepride.settings_subtitle: API Key to automatically query official item data, descriptions, and sprites.

picker.select_sprite: Select Item Drop Sprite from GRF

fields.unit_subtitle: Define properties of skills or magic that remain on the ground after cast (e.g., Fire Wall, Sanctuary).
fields.no_requirements: No requirements or costs configured for this skill.

requirements_panel.base_costs_title: Base Resource Costs (HP / SP / AP / Zeny)
requirements_panel.consumables_desc: Inventory items consumed or required to cast the skill
requirements_panel.no_consumables: No consumable items required for this skill.

no_selection.title: No Skill Selected
no_selection.subtitle: Select a skill from the list on the side to view and edit its parameters.

mob_skill_editor.delete_confirm: Do you want to remove this skill from the monster?

fields.state_hint: State in which the monster must be to use the skill.
fields.cancelable_hint: Whether the cast can be interrupted.
fields.delay_hint: Interval in ms before attempting to use the skill again.
fields.condition_type_hint: Condition type to activate the skill.
fields.condition_val_hint: Numerical value of the condition (HP%, skill ID, count, etc.)
fields.valid_status: Valid status for the ConditionValue field:
fields.hp_condition_warning: ⚠ For this condition: val1 = upper limit of HP% (e.g., 50 for 50%)
fields.emotion_hint: Emotion displayed when using the skill. -1 = none.
fields.chat_hint: NPC message broadcasted when using the skill (optional).

conditions.myhpinrate: When HP is between ConditionValue% (lower) and val1% (upper).
conditions.mystatuson: If mob has status in ConditionValue (use status name above).
conditions.mystatusoff: If mob lost status in ConditionValue.
conditions.friendhpltmaxrate: When ally HP drops below ConditionValue%.
conditions.friendhpinrate: Ally HP between ConditionValue% and val1%.
conditions.skillused: When skill ID in ConditionValue is used on mob.
conditions.afterskill: After mob uses skill ID in ConditionValue.
conditions.casttargeted: Target enters cast range. ConditionValue ignored.
conditions.groundattacked: On ground-targeted skill hit. ConditionValue ignored.
conditions.alchemist: Special AI, not trickcasting, wounded. ConditionValue ignored.
conditions.trickcasting: Once mob starts NPC_RANDOMMOVE until disabled. ConditionValue ignored.

map_engine.title: Map Engine
map_engine.subtitle: Manage per-map drops and generate custom monster spawns.
map_engine.absolute_drops_banner: Warning: Drops configured in this module are absolute. They ignore server bonus rates, Bubble Gum bonuses, and level penalties. The Rate defined here is the final drop rate (n/100000).
map_engine.global_drops_desc: Drops applied to ALL monsters on this map, regardless of type.
map_engine.specific_drops_desc: Exclusive drops for specific monsters on this map.
map_engine.no_map_selected: Select or create a map entry to edit.
map_engine.spawns_subtitle: Generate spawn snippets and inject them into npc/custom/ui_spawns.txt.
map_engine.spawns_viewer_empty: File is empty. Add your first spawn!
map_engine.spawn_live_preview_desc: This TAB-separated line will be appended to npc/custom/ui_spawns.txt.

delete_modal.confirm_message: Are you sure you want to delete
delete_modal.file_warning: The file will be permanently modified on disk. Backups are not created automatically.

setup_screen.description: Select your rAthena root folder and client files to start. The system will automatically check and load your files.

setup_screen.grf_0_help: Client .grf file for rendering sprites and icons inside the editor.
setup_screen.iteminfo_help: LUA file containing client identified names and visual descriptions.
setup_screen.api_url_placeholder: E.g. DivinePride Key or External URL
setup_screen.api_url_help: API key or endpoint for external item data and icon queries.
setup_screen.encoding_desc: Standard encodings for reading and saving files without corrupting special characters.
setup_screen.success_toast: Configuration saved and databases loaded successfully!
setup_screen.error_path_required: Please provide your rAthena root folder path.
